summary: Frontend UI overhaul verification for AutoAce landing page. All sections rendered with correct data-testids, navbar anchor scroll works (scroll-behavior: smooth), lead form submit succeeds (toast shown, fields cleared), HTML5 blocks invalid email, footer links (login->/admin route, mailto contact, LinkedIn target=_blank) all correct, /admin loads and shows the newly captured lead. No console errors or broken images.
critical_code_review_comments: LeadForm.jsx: catch block swallows the axios error object (`catch {}`); consider logging or capturing err.response.data.detail so users see server-provided messages (e.g., invalid email 422) instead of a generic toast.
Hero/Features image URLs are hardcoded unsplash URLs in JSX — fine for marketing MVP but consider moving to a central content/config module if the copy grows.

Landing page uses smooth scroll globally (html { scroll-behavior: smooth }) but there is no scroll-margin-top offset for fixed 64px navbar; anchor targets like #platform end at top=0 which puts their heading behind the navbar. Recommend adding `scroll-margin-top: 80px` on section anchors.
AdminLeads page has no auth guard yet — the 'Login' footer link exposes captured leads to anyone. Not in scope for this iteration but should be tracked as a follow-up.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 lead via UI form (TEST_lead_<ts>@example.com / Test Person / TEST_Dealer) which now appears at top of /admin table.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page + admin route fully verified on preview URL https://dealer-automation-2.preview.emergentagent.com. All expected data-testids present and functional. Lead form POST /api/leads returns 201, sonner toast appears at [data-sonner-toast], and admin table reflects new leads on refresh. Global html { scroll-behavior: smooth } means anchor click needs ~1.5-2s wait before measuring scroll position in Playwright.
